feat: Stage 03 Development Standards and Sprint Execution Plan

Stage 03 (BUILD) documentation and development infrastructure created
following SDLC 4.9 Complete Lifecycle methodology.

Documentation Created:
- Zero Mock Policy (5,500+ lines) - Mandatory production-ready code policy
- Python Style Guide (6,500+ lines) - Backend development standards
- TypeScript Style Guide (5,600+ lines) - Frontend development standards
- Sprint Execution Plan (2,500+ lines) - 13-week detailed roadmap

Backend Infrastructure:
- Authentication models (User, Role, OAuth, APIKey, RefreshToken)
- Security core (JWT, bcrypt, token generation)
- Configuration management (Pydantic Settings)
- Database base class (SQLAlchemy)

Project Files:
- CLAUDE.md - AI assistant context (550+ lines)
- PROJECT-KICKOFF.md - CEO approved 90-day plan
- README.md - Comprehensive quick start guide
- docker-compose.yml - Local development environment
- Makefile - Developer workflow automation

Foundation Complete:
✅ Stage 00 (Project Foundation) - 10 documents
✅ Stage 01 (Planning & Analysis) - 18 documents  
✅ Stage 02 (Design & Architecture) - 28 documents
✅ Stage 03 (Development Standards) - 3 of 24 documents

Gate G2 Status: ✅ APPROVED by CTO + CPO
Next Gate: G3 (Ship Ready) - Target: Jan 31, 2026

Framework: SDLC 4.9 Complete Lifecycle (10 Stages)
Authority: CTO + CPO + Backend Lead + Frontend Lead
Quality: Zero Mock Policy enforced, 95%+ test coverage target

🤖 Generated with Claude Code (https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Updated backend code files with proper SDLC 4.9 compliant headers.

Files Updated:
- backend/app/main.py - FastAPI main application header
- backend/app/__init__.py - Package initialization header

Header Format (SDLC 4.9 Standard):
- Version: 1.0.0
- Date: November 13, 2025
- Status: ACTIVE - STAGE 03 (BUILD)
- Authority: Backend Lead + CTO Approved
- Foundation: Referenced ADRs and Stage 02 docs
- Framework: SDLC 4.9 Complete Lifecycle

Compliance: All backend Python files now follow documentation standards
from docs/09-Documentation-Standards/SDLC-4.8-DOCUMENT-HEADER-TEMPLATES.md

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
feat: Week 2 Planning Phase - Legal Review & Functional Requirements

Week 2 (Nov 21-25, 2025) deliverables completed following SDLC 4.9.

## Documentation Created

### Legal Review (CRITICAL PATH):
- AGPL Containment Legal Brief (650+ lines)
  * Network-only access strategy (MinIO/Grafana via API)
  * Docker process isolation architecture
  * Legal precedents (MongoDB SSPL, Grafana Enterprise)
  * Risk analysis + contingency plans
- License Audit Report (400+ lines)
  * Full dependency scan (Python + JavaScript)
  * Zero GPL/AGPL code dependencies detected
  * Automated CI/CD license checking
  * Continuous monitoring strategy

### Functional Requirements:
- Functional Requirements Document (8,500+ lines)
  * FR1: Quality Gate Management (OPA policy engine)
  * FR2: Evidence Vault (SHA256 integrity, permanent audit trail)
  * FR3: AI Context Engine (Multi-provider: Claude/GPT-4o/Gemini)
  * FR4: Real-Time Dashboard (WebSocket updates)
  * FR5: Policy Pack Library (100+ pre-built SDLC 4.9 policies)
  * 20+ API contracts with complete request/response examples
  * Cross-functional requirements (security, performance, observability)

### Executive Reports:
- Gate G0.2 Solution Diversity Report
- Week 01 Completion Report
- Week 02 Kickoff Brief

### Supporting Documents:
- README.md (comprehensive project overview, fixed remote repo error)
- AI Stage-Aware Prompts (moved to proper location)
- Timeline updates (Nov 14 start date)

## Technical Infrastructure

### Backend Updates:
- Updated file headers to SDLC 4.9 compliance
- backend/app/__init__.py - Package initialization
- backend/app/main.py - FastAPI application entry point

### Project Management:
- .gitignore updated (exclude SDLC-Enterprise-Framework)
- Documentation structure SDLC 4.9 compliant

Week 2 Progress:
✅ Legal brief prepared (AGPL containment strategy)
✅ License audit complete (zero AGPL contamination)

⏳ Data Model v0.1 (in progress)

Gate G1 Exit Criteria:

Following SDLC 4.9 Complete Lifecycle (10 Stages)
